items.name: icons-core
items.title: Icons Core
items.description: Shared animation contract, pure frame-to-phase timeline, and SVG path-draw helpers for remocn icons.

items.name: icon-check
items.title: Check
items.description: Animated Lucide check icon — the stroke draws on, then stamps with a spring pop to mark a step, task, or claim as done.

items.name: icon-check-circle
items.title: Check Circle
items.description: Animated Lucide circle-check icon — the ring draws clockwise, the checkmark traces in, then the whole mark pops to confirm a completed or successful state.

items.name: icon-x
items.title: X
items.description: Animated Lucide x icon — the two diagonals draw in crosswise, then the mark shakes to punctuate an error, removal, or dismissal.

items.name: icon-activity
items.title: Activity
items.description: Animated Lucide activity icon — the pulse line sweeps through like an EKG, popping at the peak. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-alert-triangle
items.title: Alert Triangle
items.description: Animated Lucide triangle-alert icon — the outline draws on, the mark pops in, then the exclamation blinks to flag a risk or warning.

items.name: icon-info
items.title: Info
items.description: Animated Lucide info icon — the ring draws clockwise, the dot pops and stem draws in, then the dot bobs to draw a gentle, neutral note.

items.name: icon-loader
items.title: Loader
items.description: Animated Lucide loader-circle icon — the arc draws on, then spins continuously for a loading or processing beat. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-refresh-cw
items.title: Refresh Cw
items.description: Animated Lucide refresh-cw icon — the two arcs draw on, arrowheads pop, then the whole mark spins in cycles for sync, retry, or up-to-date messaging. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-search
items.title: Search
items.description: Animated Lucide search icon — the lens draws on, the handle extends, then the magnifier sweeps a small scanning path for a search or discovery beat.

items.name: icon-bell
items.title: Bell
items.description: Animated Lucide bell icon — the body draws on, the clapper follows, then the bell swings from its mount to signal a notification or alert.

items.name: icon-download
items.title: Download
items.description: Animated Lucide download icon — the tray draws on, the arrow fades in, then drops into the tray with a squash on impact for a download or export beat.

items.name: icon-upload
items.title: Upload
items.description: Animated Lucide upload icon — the tray draws on, the arrow fades in, then launches upward with a spring for an upload, publish, or submission beat.

items.name: icon-copy
items.title: Copy
items.description: Animated Lucide copy icon — the two sheets draw back-to-front, then the front sheet lifts and settles to read as a duplicate for a copy-to-clipboard beat.

items.name: icon-settings
items.title: Settings
items.description: Animated Lucide settings icon — the gear and center draw on, then the gear turns exactly one tooth for a settings, configuration, or customization beat.

items.name: icon-trash
items.title: Trash
items.description: Animated Lucide trash-2 icon — the can draws on, then the lid flips open and the contents vanish for a delete or cleanup beat.

items.name: icon-plus
items.title: Plus
items.description: Animated Lucide plus icon — the two strokes draw on, then the mark twirls 90deg with a scale pop for an energetic add or create beat.

items.name: icon-send
items.title: Send
items.description: Animated Lucide send icon — the paper plane draws on, then darts forward with a wind-up and settles back for a send-message beat.

items.name: icon-heart
items.title: Heart
items.description: Animated Lucide heart icon — the outline draws on, then a lub-dub heartbeat pulse for likes, favorites, or built-with-love moments.

items.name: icon-star
items.title: Star
items.description: Animated Lucide star icon — the outline draws on, then twinkles into place with a small rotate and scale pop for ratings, favorites, or star callouts.

items.name: icon-thumbs-up
items.title: Thumbs Up
items.description: Animated Lucide thumbs-up icon — the hand draws on, then springs up with an approving stamp for positive reviews, approvals, or social-proof beats.

items.name: icon-party-popper
items.title: Party Popper
items.description: Animated Lucide party-popper icon — the cone draws on, then confetti bursts outward as the cone recoils for launch, milestone, or celebration finales.

items.name: icon-arrow-right
items.title: Arrow Right
items.description: Animated Lucide arrow-right icon — the shaft and head draw on, then the arrow nudges forward for CTAs, next-step pointers, or flow direction.

items.name: icon-arrow-left
items.title: Arrow Left
items.description: Animated Lucide arrow-left icon — the shaft and head draw on, then the arrow nudges back for back navigation or 'previously' callbacks.

items.name: icon-arrow-up
items.title: Arrow Up
items.description: Animated Lucide arrow-up icon — the shaft and head draw on, then the arrow nudges up for growth, improvement, or upward-trend beats.

items.name: icon-arrow-down
items.title: Arrow Down
items.description: Animated Lucide arrow-down icon — the shaft and head draw on, then the arrow nudges down for cost/latency reduction beats or scroll cues.

items.name: icon-external-link
items.title: External Link
items.description: Animated Lucide external-link icon — the box and arrow draw on, then the arrow darts out toward the top-right for 'view on GitHub', external docs, or open-in-new-tab beats.

items.name: icon-play
items.title: Play
items.description: Animated Lucide play icon — the triangle draws on, then presses in and springs forward like a play button being hit.

items.name: icon-pause
items.title: Pause
items.description: Animated Lucide pause icon — the two bars draw on, then pinch toward each other and settle like a held breath.

items.name: icon-skip-forward
items.title: Skip Forward
items.description: Animated Lucide skip-forward icon — draws on, then dashes forward past center and snaps against its end bar.

items.name: icon-volume-2
items.title: Volume 2
items.description: Animated Lucide volume-2 icon — the speaker draws on, then the two sound waves ripple outward one after the other.

items.name: icon-volume-x
items.title: Volume X
items.description: Animated Lucide volume-x icon — the speaker draws on, then the X slashes in and the glyph shakes off the sound.

items.name: icon-mic
items.title: Mic
items.description: Animated Lucide mic icon — draws on, then the capsule bounces twice like a level meter picking up voice.

items.name: icon-video
items.title: Video
items.description: Animated Lucide video icon — draws on, then the lens wedge pans out and snaps back to its shot.

items.name: icon-camera
items.title: Camera
items.description: Animated Lucide camera icon — draws on, then the lens blinks shut and open like a shutter firing.

items.name: icon-image
items.title: Image
items.description: Animated Lucide image icon — the frame draws on, then the mountain redraws and the sun drifts into place like a photo developing.

items.name: icon-chevron-up
items.title: Chevron Up
items.description: Animated Lucide chevron-up icon — draws on, then nudges upward with a fading echo.

items.name: icon-chevron-down
items.title: Chevron Down
items.description: Animated Lucide chevron-down icon — draws on, then nudges downward with a fading echo.

items.name: icon-chevron-left
items.title: Chevron Left
items.description: Animated Lucide chevron-left icon — draws on, then nudges left with a fading echo.

items.name: icon-chevron-right
items.title: Chevron Right
items.description: Animated Lucide chevron-right icon — draws on, then nudges right with a fading echo.

items.name: icon-menu
items.title: Menu
items.description: Animated Lucide menu icon — the three bars slide in from the left, top to bottom, each overshooting into place.

items.name: icon-more-horizontal
items.title: More Horizontal
items.description: Animated Lucide more-horizontal icon — three dots pop in, then do a left-to-right thinking wave.

items.name: icon-maximize
items.title: Maximize
items.description: Animated Lucide maximize icon — four corner brackets draw on, then fly outward and spring back like a window going fullscreen.

items.name: icon-layout-grid
items.title: Layout Grid
items.description: Animated Lucide layout-grid icon — four tiles draw on, then re-pop into place clockwise like a dashboard assembling.

items.name: icon-pencil
items.title: Pencil
items.description: Animated Lucide pencil icon — draws on, then scribbles: the pencil rocks around its tip as if writing.

items.name: icon-share-2
items.title: Share 2
items.description: Animated Lucide share-2 icon — three nodes draw on, then the connections re-trace and the receiving nodes pop as the share lands.

items.name: icon-filter
items.title: Filter
items.description: Animated Lucide filter icon — the funnel draws on, then gives two quick shakes as results fall through.

items.name: icon-eye
items.title: Eye
items.description: Animated Lucide eye icon — draws on, then blinks once and refocuses its pupil.

items.name: icon-eye-off
items.title: Eye Off
items.description: Animated Lucide eye-off icon — the eye fragments draw on, then the slash cuts through and visibility dims.

items.name: icon-rocket
items.title: Rocket
items.description: Animated Lucide rocket icon — draws on, then lifts off: the ship rises on a tilt while the flame re-ignites, then eases back to rest.

items.name: icon-save
items.title: Save
items.description: Animated Lucide save icon — the disk draws on, then presses down and writes: the label slot re-draws as data commits.

items.name: icon-link
items.title: Link
items.description: Animated Lucide link icon — two chain halves draw on, pull apart, and click together.

items.name: icon-bookmark
items.title: Bookmark
items.description: Animated Lucide bookmark icon — draws on, then drops into place from above with a spring landing.

items.name: icon-lock
items.title: Lock
items.description: Animated Lucide lock icon — the body draws on, then the shackle lifts and slams shut with a confirming pop.

items.name: icon-key
items.title: Key
items.description: Animated Lucide key icon — draws on, then turns in an invisible lock and springs back.

items.name: icon-log-out
items.title: Log Out
items.description: Animated Lucide log-out icon — draws on, then the arrow steps out through the door frame with a fading echo.

items.name: icon-mail
items.title: Mail
items.description: Animated Lucide mail icon — the envelope draws on, then the flap re-traces open and the whole envelope pops: you've got mail.

items.name: icon-message-circle
items.title: Message Circle
items.description: Animated Lucide message-circle icon — the bubble draws on, then inflates from its tail like a message arriving.

items.name: icon-phone
items.title: Phone
items.description: Animated Lucide phone icon — draws on, then rings: three decaying rotation oscillations around center.

items.name: icon-at-sign
items.title: At Sign
items.description: Animated Lucide at-sign icon — the inner 'a' draws and pops, then the outer swoosh re-traces its tail: a mention landing.

items.name: icon-inbox
items.title: Inbox
items.description: Animated Lucide inbox icon — the tray draws on, then dips under the weight of an arriving item and springs back.

items.name: icon-shield
items.title: Shield
items.description: Animated Lucide shield icon — draws on, then braces: a firm guard pulse that asserts protection.

items.name: icon-help-circle
items.title: Help Circle
items.description: Animated Lucide help-circle icon — the ring draws on, then the question mark re-draws and tilts like a curious head.

items.name: icon-plus-circle
items.title: Plus Circle
items.description: Animated Lucide plus-circle icon — the ring draws on, the plus crosses in, then the whole badge pops.

items.name: icon-x-circle
items.title: X Circle
items.description: Animated Lucide x-circle icon — the ring draws on, the X slashes in, and the badge shakes once: firmly rejected.

items.name: icon-calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Animated Lucide calendar icon — the pad draws on, then the binder rings dip and the page snaps into place.

items.name: icon-clock
items.title: Clock
items.description: Animated Lucide clock icon — the face draws on, then the hands sweep through discrete ticks. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-timer
items.title: Timer
items.description: Animated Lucide timer icon — draws on, then the start button clicks and the hand sweeps: the stopwatch is running.

items.name: icon-home
items.title: Home
items.description: Animated Lucide home icon — the house draws on, then the door re-draws open and the house settles: welcome home.

items.name: icon-folder
items.title: Folder
items.description: Animated Lucide folder icon — draws on, then the folder tips open for a peek and closes.

items.name: icon-file-text
items.title: File Text
items.description: Animated Lucide file-text icon — the page draws on, then the text lines type themselves in, top to bottom.

items.name: icon-code
items.title: Code
items.description: Animated Lucide code icon — the angle brackets draw on, pull apart, and snap back around their code.

items.name: icon-target
items.title: Target
items.description: Animated Lucide target icon — three rings draw in from outside, then the bullseye hits: inner dot pops and the board shudders.

items.name: icon-terminal
items.title: Terminal
items.description: Animated Lucide terminal icon — draws on, then the prompt nudges forward and the cursor blinks twice.

items.name: icon-database
items.title: Database
items.description: Animated Lucide database icon — the cylinder draws on, then a write lands: the top disc pops and data settles down the stack.

items.name: icon-cloud
items.title: Cloud
items.description: Animated Lucide cloud icon — draws on, then floats: a weightless bob and a half before settling.

items.name: icon-globe
items.title: Globe
items.description: Animated Lucide globe icon — draws on, then the meridian sweeps west to east like the world turning. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-monitor
items.title: Monitor
items.description: Animated Lucide monitor icon — the stand draws, then the screen powers on with a CRT-style unsquash.

items.name: icon-smartphone
items.title: Smartphone
items.description: Animated Lucide smartphone icon — draws on, then buzzes: three fast vibration oscillations.

items.name: icon-sun
items.title: Sun
items.description: Animated Lucide sun icon — the core draws on, then eight rays fan out clockwise and the sun swells: sunrise.

items.name: icon-moon
items.title: Moon
items.description: Animated Lucide moon icon — draws on, then rocks gently into place: settling in for the night.

items.name: icon-shopping-cart
items.title: Shopping Cart
items.description: Animated Lucide shopping-cart icon — draws on, then rolls forward to checkout, wheels popping as it stops.

items.name: icon-credit-card
items.title: Credit Card
items.description: Animated Lucide credit-card icon — the card draws on, then the stripe swipes through and the card tips: payment accepted.

items.name: icon-crown
items.title: Crown
items.description: Animated Lucide crown icon — descends into place from above, lands with a pop, then rocks regally to rest.

items.name: icon-dollar-sign
items.title: Dollar Sign
items.description: Animated Lucide dollar-sign icon — draws on, then the sign stretches tall: understated cha-ching.

items.name: icon-tag
items.title: Tag
items.description: Animated Lucide tag icon — draws on, then swings from its hole like a price tag flicked by a shopper.

items.name: icon-package
items.title: Package
items.description: Animated Lucide package icon — the box draws on, lands with a squash-and-stretch, then the tape seam seals it.

items.name: icon-gem
items.title: Gem
items.description: Animated Lucide gem icon — the stone draws on, then light catches it: facets re-trace in sequence with a flicker and a pop.

items.name: icon-gift
items.title: Gift
items.description: Animated Lucide gift icon — draws on, then the lid lifts for a peek and lands with a ribbon pop: almost unwrapped.

items.name: icon-wallet
items.title: Wallet
items.description: Animated Lucide wallet icon — draws on, then the wallet thickens with a quiet x-scale: money in.

items.name: icon-award
items.title: Award
items.description: Animated Lucide award icon — the medal draws on, the ribbon unfurls beneath it, then the medal swings to rest.

items.name: icon-bar-chart-3
items.title: Bar Chart 3
items.description: Animated Lucide bar-chart-3 icon — the axis draws on, then three bars rise left to right with overshoot: the classic growth chart.

items.name: icon-trending-down
items.title: Trending Down
items.description: Animated Lucide trending-down icon — the line descends across, then the arrowhead lands with damped weight.

items.name: icon-trending-up
items.title: Trending Up
items.description: Animated Lucide trending-up icon — the line climbs across, then the arrowhead pops at the peak.

items.name: icon-trophy
items.title: Trophy
items.description: Animated Lucide trophy icon — draws on, then hoists: the cup hops with a pop at the apex while its handles flash in.

items.name: icon-user
items.title: User
items.description: Animated Lucide user icon — draws on, then gives a small presence nod: head dips as shoulders rise to meet it.

items.name: icon-users
items.title: Users
items.description: Animated Lucide users icon — the front figure draws on and pops, then the second figure slides in from behind: the team assembles.

items.name: icon-user-plus
items.title: User Plus
items.description: Animated Lucide user-plus icon — the figure draws on, then the plus strokes draw in and pop: a new member added.

items.name: icon-sparkles
items.title: Sparkles
items.description: Animated Lucide sparkles icon — the main sparkle draws on, the accents pop, then a looping twinkle for AI, magic, or premium highlights. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-zap
items.title: Zap
items.description: Animated Lucide zap icon — the bolt draws in fast, then flashes with a double blink for speed, performance, or instant-result claims.

items.name: icon-flame
items.title: Flame
items.description: Animated Lucide flame icon — the outline draws on, then flickers with a looping scale-and-skew wobble for hot features, trending items, or streaks. Loops by default.
